failures.name: Basic service request
failures.summary: The agent captured the necessary details and confirmed them but did not schedule a callback.
failures.root_cause: The agent failed to schedule a callback.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, my AC isn’t cooling. I need some help with it.
I completely understand, let me get you sorted right away. Can I have your full name, please?
Sure, it's John Smith.
Great, thanks for that, John. What’s the best callback number for you?
My number is 555-234-5678.
Perfect, got it. That's 555-234-5678, correct?
Yes, that's correct.
Thank you! Now, can you provide the service address where the AC issue is?
It's 123 Main St, Dallas TX.
I want to be upfront with you — we may not service that area. Let me take your details and have our team confirm whether we can help you. Can you please confirm the ZIP code?
Sure, the ZIP code is 75201.

Great, thanks for that. Just to confirm, I have John Smith, callback number 555-234-5678, service address 123 Main St, Dallas TX, ZIP code 75201, and you need help with your AC not cooling. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that's all correct.
Perfect — I've noted your details. Our team will be in touch shortly to confirm if we can assist you. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Request live person immediately
failures.summary: The agent attempted to transfer the caller but failed to connect and did not handle the situation effectively.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not successfully transfer the caller to a live person as requested.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
I want to speak to someone.
Sure, let me connect you with Mike or one of the team right now. One moment please.
Okay, thank you.
I'm just going to transfer you now, one moment please.
Alright, I appreciate it.
I'm sorry, I wasn't able to connect you right now. Can I get your name and callback number? I'll make sure someone reaches out to you as soon as possible.
I’d rather not leave my info. Can you just connect me?
I understand, but I can't connect you directly without your details. If you'd like, you can call us back later. Is there anything else I can assist you with?
No, I really just want to speak to someone now.
I completely understand. If you'd like, I can take your name and number, and someone will call you back shortly. Would that work for you?
I just want to talk to someone right now.
I appreciate your patience. Unfortunately, I can't connect you directly without your details. If you change your mind, feel free to call us back. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Ductwork cleaning inquiry
failures.summary: The agent failed to confirm service availability and did not initiate a transfer for scheduling.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not offer to transfer the caller to a team member who could confirm service availability.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I’m interested in duct cleaning services. Can you tell me more about that?
Duct cleaning is one of the services we offer. It helps improve air quality and system efficiency. Would you like to schedule a service or get more details?
I’d like more details, please. How often should ducts be cleaned?

It's generally recommended to have your ducts cleaned every 3 to 5 years, depending on factors like pets, allergies, and dust levels in your home. Is there anything specific you'd like to know about our duct cleaning service?
What does the duct cleaning process involve?

The duct cleaning process typically includes inspecting the ducts, using specialized equipment to remove dust and debris, and ensuring the system is clean and efficient. Would you like to schedule a service or have more questions?
How long does the cleaning usually take?
The duct cleaning process usually takes about 2 to 4 hours, depending on the size of your system. Would you like to set up an appointment for this service?
Yes, I’d like to set up an appointment. What dates do you have available?
I can help with that! First, could you please provide your full name?
It's Patricia Lee.
Great, thanks Patricia! What’s the best callback number for you?
My number is 555-888-9999.
Perfect, got it. Now, could you please provide the service address?
Sure, it’s 147 Birch Lane, Dallas, TX.

I want to be upfront with you — we may not service that area. Let me take your details and have our team confirm whether we can help you. 

Could you please provide your ZIP code?
Thank you, Patricia. Just to confirm, I have your full name as Patricia Lee, callback number 555-888-9999, service address 147 Birch Lane, Dallas, TX 75201. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that’s all correct.
Perfect — I've noted your details, and our team will confirm whether we can assist you in Dallas. Someone will be in touch shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]
